race.description: Ladbrokes See The Big Bets On Every Event Hcp (55)
race.comment: TRUSTY BANDIT (6) finished fourth last time out over 2000m at Gatton, beaten 5 lengths. Has a sound record here with two wins and a placing from five starts. Looks to have an edge on most of these and has to be included. CHEERFUL CAT (5) doesn't win out of turn but has hit the frame at his past five outings and is a must for the exotics players. SHE'S BRUTAL (7) ran below expectations last time at Toowoomba, finishing seventh and beaten 5.5 lengths starting at $3.20. Well placed in this contest and there is no reason why she cannot find winning ways. PEACH GALANTES (10) ran a better race last start, finishing 4 lengths away in fourth over 1050m at Toowoomba. Finds a nice race and can make amends.
